Transport

Airport and onboard train WiFi that lifts revenue and passenger satisfaction.

Airports and train operators need WiFi that handles huge passenger volumes while still delivering clean, usable data, with a branded captive portal for one-time visitors and the Purple app keeping frequent travelers reconnecting without friction.

Tiered free and premium access that scales to millions of connections
Every email validated, so campaign data is never wasted
Frequent visitors reconnect automatically through the app
The conversation

What your customer is dealing with right now.

Managing secure staff access across a sprawling terminal estate

From check-in desks to baggage handling and retail, staff depend on secure, reliable connectivity across a large and complex estate, and every device and contractor needs the right level of access, with role-based access and clear visibility of usage across every terminal.

Passenger WiFi that's a cost center, not a revenue line

Passengers expect to connect in seconds and stay online through security, the lounge, and the gate. Purple connects passengers fast, builds rich passenger profiles from every login, and lets operators serve targeted, location-aware offers that lift concession and retail spend.

Passenger email capture that's mostly noise

High footfall public WiFi means a flood of fake, misspelled, and disposable email addresses. Verify checks every address in real time at login, so passenger data actually feeds usable marketing campaigns.

Where Purple fits

The products that solve it.

GUEST WIFI
Passenger WiFi as a revenue line, not a cost center

Passengers connect in seconds and stay online through security, the lounge, and the gate, via the Purple app, building rich profiles that power targeted, location-aware offers.

Branded captive portal or seamless connection
STAFF WIFI
Role-based access across a sprawling terminal estate

WPA3-Enterprise gives every staff member and contractor the right level of access automatically, with clear visibility of usage across every terminal.

Works with Entra ID, Google & Okta

Real results from transport customers.

Real case studies from real transport deployments, each with its own numbers.

463%
Return on investment
Travel & transport
Avanti West Coast
The initiative delivered a large jump in repeat travellers and a substantial measured return on investment.
151%
projected ROI
Travel & transport
c2c
Over the first 9 months, 81,601 unique users logged into the WiFi 343,340 times, and the passenger data let c2c validate a high share of emails and drive strong marketing opt-ins, projecting meaningful savings on OTA fees over a full year.
842%
ROI
Travel & transport
AGS Airports
The tiered model generated significant additional revenue and a clean, verified passenger database.
Marketing support

Need co-branded materials for transport?

Request sector-specific campaign packs, one-pagers, and co-branded assets for transport deals, including Purple app collateral you can hand straight to a prospect.

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.
